extra_lines: L33 ALWAYS-CLOTHED HARD: Amaka stays fully clothed. Black athletic crop top + black high-waist dance leggings (tiers 2-5) → traditional Nigerian-inspired warrior wear with gold trim crop + deep ochre wrap skirt + gold arm bands (tiers 6-8). Breasts, groin, glutes always covered. Garments may stretch but never expose.

L17 AMAKA CANONICAL ANCHOR: Every face-visible panel shows Amaka with long box braids reaching mid-back (golden-brown with a few amber-beaded accents at random braid tips), dark brown eyes, rich dark brown Nigerian skin, age 24, strikingly beautiful, vogue-cover glamour, elegant features, athletic-dancer build at baseline, full lips, clear skin. Braids are TIED BACK at baseline (panels 1-5); LOOSE AND FLOWING at peak (panels 6-10) with subtle golden glow at the braid tips.
L21 REFERENCE EXCLUSION: Attached refs are guidance only — never physical scene objects.

L22 HAIR STATE EXPLICIT: Every face-visible panel names braid state per schedule. Color: golden-brown box braids with amber bead accents (panels 1-5). From panel 6 add 'subtle golden-orisha glow at braid tips and along the length'.

L23 ENV VERBAL ANCHOR (dance studio): When env ref dropped: modern dance studio interior, full-wall mirrors along one wall, polished honey-wood sprung dance floor, white-painted ballet barre at hip height along the opposite wall, mid-afternoon natural light streaming through tall windows, water bottle and gray towel on the floor near the barre, white walls with one accent wall in burnt-sienna ochre, slim steel ceiling lights.

L24 ACCESSORY SUPPRESSION: Gold ankle bracelet on the LEFT ankle is CANONICAL — keep in every panel where the left ankle is in frame. Suppress hallucinated watches / rings / necklaces / earrings (orisha-given gold arm bands appear at tier 6 on both upper arms and are explicit, not suppressed).

L29 TIER REINFORCEMENT (tier-6, tier-7, AND tier-8 auto-attach): Panel 6 auto-attaches tier-6 reinforcement from skills/comic-production/references/peak-body-scale/tier-6/. Panel 8 auto-attaches tier-7 from peak-body-scale/tier-7/. Panels 9-10 auto-attach tier-8 from peak-body-scale/tier-8/. Render figure-scale at or above the ref.

PHOTOREAL CGI / DAZ3D STYLE: All renders photoreal DAZ3D / Iray with ray-traced subsurface scattering on the rich dark Nigerian skin, PBR materials, 8K textures. Orisha energy = volumetric warm gold-amber glow with bronze and copper highlights, ancestral aura, subtle floating golden particles. 2D scope is captions only on panels 4, 7, 10.

BEAUTY ANCHORING: Amaka renders strikingly beautiful — vogue-cover Nigerian beauty, elegant features, glamour lighting on the face, defined cheekbones, full lips, dark eyes with depth. Muscle scale at tier 8 does NOT degrade facial beauty — she remains stunningly beautiful at peak.

CHEST OVERSIZE COMPENSATION: Tier 3 onward prompt for chest size LARGER than the lineup. Bust scales with muscle through tier 8. Tier 8 Amaka has both massively developed muscle AND oversized bust per the lineup tier-8 figure.
AUTONOMOUS VARIANT SELECTION: Autopilot, no mid-run asks.
DIALOGUE MODE MINIMAL — captions on panels 4, 7, 10 only (L19 flat 2D overlay).

TONE — TRIUMPHANT SPIRITUAL: Amaka accepts and channels the orisha power. Expression arc: focused dance → listening → reverent recognition → empowered → commanding. She is the dance, the strength, the ancestor's vessel — never afraid, never overwhelmed.

ORISHA POWER VISUAL ANCHOR: Warm gold-amber ancestral aura grows panel by panel. Starts as subtle warmth in panel 2 (visible in eyes / breath). By panel 5 fills the space around her with floating golden particles. By panel 6 the warrior wear materializes in the gold glow. By panels 8-10 she radiates power like a young goddess — heavy volumetric gold-amber aura, ground beneath her feet glows faintly, braid tips trail golden light.
